_comment: REAL on-chain DarkBox/Frontier contracts on the AttestMesh hidden chain (chainId 88813). IMPORTANT: the original (dfab20b) deploy NEVER mined — the clique chain was stuck at block 1 from boot (single active signer can't seal past block 1 in a 2-signer clique), so forge only printed PREDICTED addresses with no code on-chain. After geth-2 was promoted to a co-signer (2026-06-14) the chain advanced, and the overseer re-ran the deployer — THIS is the first real, mined deploy. The new deployer's deploy order differs, so addresses moved: marketFactory is now 0x671703 (the OLD predicted-factory 0x7534 is now syntheticUSDC). The indexer consumes marketFactory + syntheticUSDC via env (overseer injected MARKET_FACTORY_ADDRESS=0x671703 + SYNTHETIC_USDC_ADDRESS=0x7534) and discovers books dynamically from MarketCreated.
redeployedAt: 2026-06-14 (post geth-2 co-signer promotion; first real on-chain deploy)
